name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw that you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — we know dental care isn't always top of the list, and there's zero pressure from us.

If you ever decide the time is right to come back, here's 20% off your next visit as a small thank-you for giving us a try:

{{coupon.code}}

This code is good for the next 14 days and works on cleanings, consultations, or any follow-up care you need. New-patient consultations are still free, too — the discount just applies on top of anything else.

If something about your last experience didn't feel right, I'd genuinely want to hear it — just hit reply. We're trying to make dental care feel less scary, one patient at a time, and honest feedback is how we get there.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
